title: Identity Configuration
description: Deployment-level identity and authorization configuration: OIDC providers, claim-to-role mappings, role permission grants and session policy. Workforce packages declare the roles their workflows require; this configuration maps IdP claims onto those roles.

providers.description: Identity providers enabled for this deployment. Several may be enabled simultaneously.

type.description: 'oidc' for any OpenID Connect compliant provider; 'mock' for tests and offline development.

issuer.description: OIDC issuer URL; discovery is read from {issuer}/.well-known/openid-configuration. Required when type is 'oidc'.

clientId.description: OAuth client id registered with the provider. Required when type is 'oidc'.

scopes.description: Scopes requested during authorization. Defaults to ['openid', 'profile', 'email'].

groupsClaim.description: Name of the token/userinfo claim carrying group memberships. Defaults to 'groups'.

roleMappings.description: Maps IdP claims to FlowForge roles declared by workforce packages, e.g. group 'Staff' → role 'teacher'.

provider.description: Restrict this mapping to one provider id. Omit to apply to all providers.

value.description: Claim value (or array member) that grants the role.

role.description: FlowForge role granted, matching roles used on workflow human nodes.

permissions.description: Role-to-permission grants. Keys are role names; values are the actions the role may perform.

ttlSeconds.description: Maximum session lifetime in seconds. Defaults to 8 hours.
